steps.t: Grámi Hornhelm can be found in Olin's Forge, in Hammerstead. You should talk to Grámi Hornhelm.
Grámi Hornhelm can be found in Hammerstead. You should talk to Grámi Hornhelm.
An Easterling is being held prisoner in Hammerstead. You should talk to the Easterling prisoner.
You should talk to Grámi Hornhelm, who can be found in Hammerstead.
Lord Náin needs to know about the Jangovar threat. You should return to Járnfast with Tuhâl.
Lord Náin needs to know about the Jangovar threat. You should bring Tuhâl before Lord Náin in Járnfast.
